markdownRemark.html:
POETRY & PROSE CRAWL

Friday, June 5th, 2026 6-8 PM

Revive Coffee – 81 S. Washington St., Sonora.

Poetry & Prose – Adult
Open Mic spoken/written word – 6 minutes max.
MC’d by ayreAnna

Servente’s Saloon-64 S. Washington St., Sonora

Cowboy Poetry & Prose Performance & Open Mic
Performers: Kent Reeves, Wendy Brown-Barry, Connie Corcoran, Cyndie Zikmond
Mc’d by Amy Lee

Black Bomb Entertainment – 12 S. Washington St., Sonora

Poetry Slam – Ages 14 and up
Judges: Nick Hugues, Joslyne Wrede

Goodness Café – 1 S. Washington St., Sonora

Children’s Poetry & Prose & Open Mic – Ages 6-10
Performers: Cynthia Restivo, Glenn Ditman, Kristin Fulton
Mc’d by Glenn Ditman

frontmatter.title: June 5th 2026 POETRY & PROSE CRAWL
frontmatter.description: Join us for a night of poetry and prose at four different locations in Sonora on Friday night!
